visual_mood: Premium product shot on dark wooden table with warm window light -- real environment, real reflections, callouts pointing to features

layout.composition: Product on a dark wooden surface with warm side lighting from a window. 4 callouts radiating outward with thin red arrows. Headline at top. Logo bottom-right. Background is simple but real -- blurred warm bokeh behind the table.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline largest, labels medium bold, descriptions small
layout.background: Dark wooden table surface, warm window light from the left, soft bokeh in background

product.placement: Resting on a dark wooden table, arms slightly open, warm window light from the left catching the glossy lens surface with natural reflections, real contact shadow on the wood grain
product.instruction: The sunglasses must accurately match the multi-angle reference images. Real glossy sunglasses on a real surface with real light and real lens reflections. One cohesive photograph.

brand.color_scheme: Warm dark tones from the wood and window light, white text for contrast, thin red callout arrows

prompt: A product photograph of Bandits Green sunglasses from DuberyMNL resting on a dark wooden table with warm window light coming from the left. Real glossy sunglasses accurately matching the multi-angle reference images, with natural reflections in the lens from the window light and a real contact shadow on the wood grain. Soft warm bokeh in the background. All text in the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. White headline 'BUILT TO PERFORM' at top. Four callout labels with thin red arrows: 'POLARIZED LENSES' and 'UV400 PROTECTION' above, 'FLEXIBLE TEMPLES' and 'DURABLE HINGES' below, each with small description. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio.
